message.content:
This bibliography (entries 1–25) for *The Global State of Game Publishing and Marketing 2025 Industry Report* functions as a reference index that enables retrieval of answers to questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Video game distribution evolution, self-publishing, community building, cross-platform development, gaming safety, marketing trends, console subscription models, co-development, indie game funding, influencer marketing, data analytics, monetization strategies, and esports audiences/sponsorships.
- **Entities:** Research and consulting firms (Bain & Company, Deloitte, Statista, Cognitive Market Research, EOS intelligence), gaming media (Pocket Gamer.biz, PC Games Insider, Game Developer, Games Industry, Venture Beat, 80LV), agencies/studios (Active Fence, Amber Studio, Neonhive, Cominted Labs, AAA Agency, Fourth Floor Creative), and specific titles/events (Palworld, 2024 Esports World Cup).
- **Dates:** Source publication dates range from June 15, 2012, to January 16, 2025, with the majority published between 2020 and 2025.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** Does not contain direct definitions or procedural steps, but cites external sources that cover them, including community-building guides, cross-platform development explanations, influencer collaboration frameworks, and monetization pathway strategies.
- **Claims & Metrics:** Points to sources containing specific industry claims and quantitative data, including Palworld exceeding 25 million players, the indie games market achieving unprecedented success in 2024, 27 brands sponsoring the 2024 Esports World Cup, TIGA declaring self-publishing the "future of gaming," and global esports audience size tracking (2020–2025).
- **Tables & Figures:** Contains no tables or figures; serves exclusively as a citation list directing readers to external reports and articles where visual data may be located.
- **Evidence Types:** Comprises industry reports, market research studies, statistical datasets, news articles, blog posts, PDF guides, and agency whitepapers.
- **Citation Format:** Follows a consistent structure: Author’s Last Name, First Name. “Page Title.” Website Name. Month Day, Year. URL.

This bibliography (entries 1–25) for *The Global State of Game Publishing and Marketing 2025 Industry Report* functions as a reference index that enables retrieval of answers to questions regarding:
- **Topics:** Video game distribution evolution, self-publishing, community building, cross-platform development, gaming safety, marketing trends, console subscription models, co-development, indie game funding, influencer marketing, data analytics, monetization strategies, and esports audiences/sponsorships.
- **Entities:** Research and consulting firms (Bain & Company, Deloitte, Statista, Cognitive Market Research, EOS intelligence), gaming media (Pocket Gamer.biz, PC Games Insider, Game Developer, Games Industry, Venture Beat, 80LV), agencies/studios (Active Fence, Amber Studio, Neonhive, Cominted Labs, AAA Agency, Fourth Floor Creative), and specific titles/events (Palworld, 2024 Esports World Cup).
- **Dates:** Source publication dates range from June 15, 2012, to January 16, 2025, with the majority published between 2020 and 2025.
- **Definitions & Procedures:** Does not contain direct definitions or procedural steps, but cites external sources that cover them, including community-building guides, cross-platform development explanations, influencer collaboration frameworks, and monetization pathway strategies.
- **Claims & Metrics:** Points to sources containing specific industry claims and quantitative data, including Palworld exceeding 25 million players, the indie games market achieving unprecedented success in 2024, 27 brands sponsoring the 2024 Esports World Cup, TIGA declaring self-publishing the "future of gaming," and global esports audience size tracking (2020–2025).
- **Tables & Figures:** Contains no tables or figures; serves exclusively as a citation list directing readers to external reports and articles where visual data may be located.
- **Evidence Types:** Comprises industry reports, market research studies, statistical datasets, news articles, blog posts, PDF guides, and agency whitepapers.
- **Citation Format:** Follows a consistent structure: Author’s Last Name, First Name. “Page Title.” Website Name. Month Day, Year. URL.
